item.title: YARA-X 1.14.0 Release, (Sat, Mar 7th)
item.source: SANS Internet Storm Center, InfoCON: green
item.content:encoded: YARA-X's 1.14.0 release brings 4 improvements and 2 bugfixes.

item.title: An Investigation Into Years of Undetected Operations Targeting High-Value Sectors
item.author: Tom Fakterman
item.content:encoded: In-depth analysis of threat activity we call CL-UNK-1068. We discuss their toolset, including tunneling, reconnaissance and credential theft.

item.title: ISC Stormcast For Friday, March 6th, 2026 https://isc.sans.edu/podcastdetail/9838, (Fri, Mar 6th)
item.source: SANS Internet Storm Center, InfoCON: green

item.title: ISC Stormcast For Thursday, March 5th, 2026 https://isc.sans.edu/podcastdetail/9836, (Thu, Mar 5th)
item.source: SANS Internet Storm Center, InfoCON: green

item.title: Differentiating Between a Targeted Intrusion and an Automated Opportunistic Scanning [Guest Diary], (Wed, Mar 4th)
item.source: SANS Internet Storm Center, InfoCON: green
item.content:encoded: [This is a Guest Diary by Joseph Gruen, an ISC intern as part of the SANS.edu BACS program]
